nasb.text: The Lord said to me, ‘See, I have begun to deliver Sihon and his land over to you. Begin to occupy, that you may possess his land.’

esv.text: And the Lord said to me, ‘Behold, I have begun to give Sihon and his land over to you. Begin to take possession, that you may occupy his land.’

cnv.text: 耶和華對我說：‘看哪，我已經把西宏和他的地交給你了，你可以佔領他的地作產業。’

ccb.text: 耶和华对我说，‘看啊，我已把西宏和他的土地交给你了，去占领那里，夺取他的土地吧。’
